title: Zygopetalum hemixanthum
taxonomy: Zygopetalum hemixanthum is a species of orchid. This species belongs to the subtribe Zygopetalinae. It is classified within the tribe Maxillarieae, which is part of the larger family Orchidaceae. The Maxillarieae tribe is further grouped into the subfamily Epidendroideae. Zygopetalum hemixanthum's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the orchid family.
